Class SBMLSpecies

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.natural.biology.loaders.sbml.SBMLSpecies
public class SBMLSpecies extends Object
Represents a species (metabolite) in an SBML model.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
